response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong expertise in distributed systems, testing, and mentorship. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing less than one year of professional C++ experience. His background is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, making him an unsuitable fit for a role heavily focused on C++ cloud compute platforms.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and building distributed systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong background in technical leadership, mentoring, and establishing engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Proven ability to own and drive large technical projects to completion, including founding and architecting an open-source Geo-Data platform.
concerns: Lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with less than 1 year explicitly listed.
Cloud architecture experience is present but leans more towards web and application layers (TypeScript/Node/AWS CDK) rather than low-level compute infrastructure.
Recent roles focus heavily on full-stack product engineering and AI tooling rather than core cloud compute platform engineering.
